# Yanis Sebastian Zürcher

> Portfolio site of Yanis Sebastian Zürcher, a software developer based in Zürich, Switzerland, specializing in full-stack development, web applications, and modern technologies.

Also known as Sebi Zürcher. Works mainly with React, TypeScript, Spring Boot, and MongoDB, with a background in cybersecurity and identity and access management. This site documents his experience, skills, and personal projects. Content is available in English, German, Spanish, Japanese, and Chinese via a language switcher; the URLs below serve the English version.

## Pages

- [Home](https://sola.ysz.life/): Introduction and quick links to socials and contact.
- [About](https://sola.ysz.life/about): Background, interests, and personal story.
- [Experience](https://sola.ysz.life/experience): Work history and professional roles.
- [Projects](https://sola.ysz.life/projects): Overview of software projects.
- [Skills](https://sola.ysz.life/skills): Technical skills and proficiency levels.
- [Certifications](https://sola.ysz.life/certifications): Certificates and credentials earned.
- [Services](https://sola.ysz.life/services): Freelance and contract services offered.
- [Contact](https://sola.ysz.life/contact): Contact form and direct contact links.

## Projects

- [magi](https://sola.ysz.life/projects/magi): Fast, asynchronous TCP/UDP port scanner written in Rust.
- [Kinoa](https://sola.ysz.life/projects/kinoa): Free streaming site built with Next.js, shadcn/ui, and Supabase.
- [Luma](https://sola.ysz.life/projects/luma): Multi-model, bring-your-own-key AI platform (Claude, GPT, Gemini, Grok, and more) built with Next.js 16, the Vercel AI SDK, and Supabase.
- [Sola](https://sola.ysz.life/projects/sola): This portfolio site, built with React and TypeScript.
- [AppliCare](https://sola.ysz.life/projects/applicare): Job application management platform built with Spring Boot, MongoDB Atlas, and React.
- [Self](https://sola.ysz.life/projects/self): Customizable Windows system information display tool inspired by Neofetch, built with Python.
- [Website Code Extractor](https://sola.ysz.life/projects/code-extractor): Tool for extracting code from websites.
- [Thoughts](https://sola.ysz.life/projects/thoughts): Minimal personal site for reflections and notes, with a guestbook.
- [Taco](https://sola.ysz.life/projects/taco): Production-ready template site built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://sola.ysz.life/sitemap.xml): Full list of indexable URLs on this site.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/lyfe691): Source code and open-source projects.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/yanis-sebastian-zürcher/): Professional profile.
- [Resume (English)](https://sola.ysz.life/sola_en.pdf): Downloadable résumé.
- [Resume (German)](https://sola.ysz.life/sola_de.pdf): Downloadable résumé in German.
